home.feat1_body: We only work with high-end properties. Each property goes through a rigorous selection process.
home.feat2_body: We know the Costa Blanca in depth. We guide you through every stage of the purchase or rental with complete discretion.
home.feat3_body: We work in Spanish, English, French and German to ensure seamless communication with our clients.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_intro: In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), we inform you that the personal data collected through this website is processed by:
privacy.s2_intro: The personal data you provide through the contact form will be processed for the following purposes:
privacy.s2_li1: To handle and respond to your information request.
privacy.s2_li2: To manage the commercial relationship arising from interest in our properties.
privacy.s2_li3: To send you information about similar properties and services, provided you have given your consent.
privacy.s3_body: The processing of your data is based on the consent you grant us by checking the acceptance box in the contact form (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), as well as the legitimate interest in responding to received inquiries (Art. 6.1.f GDPR).
privacy.s4_body: Your data will be retained for the time necessary to handle your request and, where applicable, for the duration of the commercial relationship. Once concluded, it will be kept locked for the legally required periods.
privacy.s5_body: Your data will not be shared with third parties except where legally required. For service provision, we may use technology service providers (web hosting, management tools) who act as data processors under agreements required by regulations.
privacy.s6_intro: You may exercise the following rights at any time:
privacy.s6_li1_text: find out what data we hold about you.
privacy.s6_li3_text: request the deletion of your data.
privacy.s6_li5_text: receive your data in a structured format.
privacy.s6_contact_pre: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s6_contact_mid: stating your name, surname and the right you wish to exercise. You may also lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (
privacy.s7_body: We have implemented the necessary technical and organisational measures to ensure the security and integrity of the personal data we process, and to prevent its loss, alteration and/or access by unauthorised third parties.
